pin: # OEM Mechatronik external 16-pin connector — the wires that go out to the
# `tcm_pin` is the corresponding internal-connector pin per
# tcm_pinout.csv. Tests verify both directions of this mapping.

name: T15_WAKE
notes: ignition wake-up; logic-level high while key in run/start

name: T30_VBAT
notes: permanent +12 V battery (paralleled internally to TCM pin 22)

name: T31_GND
notes: chassis ground (paralleled internally to TCM pin 25)
